markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content publishing, performance, and strategic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publish Now, Fix Later:** Publish 10 articles immediately to maintain velocity. Growth X will update images post-publishing, unblocking the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Boost Top Content:** Counter a 44% session drop on "Best AI Recruiting Tools" by adding internal links from new articles and a featured section on the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Align Content with Rebrand:** Share the new "agency recruiting platform" messaging with Growth X to update existing content and ensure future alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Resolve Technical SEO Issues:** Investigate a Webflow issue causing excessive image loads (e.g., 1,600x page views), which is consuming gigabyte usage and hurting SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing & Imagery

  - [**Problem:** Donald paused publishing 10 articles due to generic imagery.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish now, update later.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritize publishing frequency for a new blog; imagery is not a primary SEO signal.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Process:** Growth X's design team will update images once Marta (Content Manager) returns from PTO next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**New Imagery Guidelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Comparison:** Two logos side-by-side.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Logo of the main company being compared.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Conceptual:** Imagery that visually represents the article's theme (e.g., a black hole for the "black hole of recruiting" article).](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Content Performance & SEO Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The "Best AI Recruiting Tools" article saw a 44% week-over-week session drop.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Solution:** Boost performance with internal linking, not an immediate refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Focus on monthly/quarterly trends for new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [**Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
          - [Add internal links from new articles to the top 4 performing posts.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
          - [Create a "Featured Blog Posts" section on the homepage to pass "link juice."](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
          - [Ensure all new product pages link to relevant blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**Rebranding & Content Alignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**New Positioning:** Shifting from "AI recruiting platform" to "agency recruiting platform."](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [**Action:** Share new messaging with Growth X to update existing content and align future production.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Technical SEO & Webflow Issues

  - [**Problem:** High Webflow gigabyte usage from excessive image loads.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [**Example:** One image loaded 1,600x more than its page was viewed in the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** This is likely a hotlinking issue, not just large file sizes.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Action:** Growth X will run a Semrush site audit to identify and fix technical SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Publish the 10 articles currently on hold.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Add a "Featured Blog Posts" section to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [Share new "agency recruiting platform" messaging with Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Contact Webflow support about the excessive image load issue.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [Update imagery for the 10 published articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Run a Semrush site audit and report findings next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [Ask the Growth X team about similar Webflow image load issues.](https://fathom.video/share/SHbN28dJsYtianDVpgtsDirzArPNfPYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
